title: Prose address by display name (an alias of the agent)
predicted_basis: multi-identity addressing pool: the display name 'Vigil' is declared in agent.aliases; a direct request naming it is a direct request at this agent
failure_mode: the gate only knows the configured agent id and mention token, so a name-addressed request reads as aimed at an unknown third party and PASSes
invariant: a message naming ANY identity in the agent's bundle (id, mention_id, aliases) is addressed to this agent
rationale: The operator addresses the bot by its room display name, not its id or mention token. With the name declared as an alias, this is a plain direct request warranting one substantive turn.
